text.message: I think he knows the block
i wanted knights to keep you blocked all game
Orange blue is your dev comp
But feel free to keep robbing me
no competition only love for black
How did you lose army to red blue
They’re in love with me it’s ok
They don’t know how to play a dev game red it’s ok
Didn’t know I was doing well this game blue
You’d figure with all these robs on me
I really hope you do blue
You can’t script it any better
The fact that orange doesn’t realize blue is on 3 vp is hilarious
I’m playing with some great players
